summary.summary: Moves the post-bolus determineBasalSync() call out of the bolus do/catch and wraps it in its own do/catch so algorithm errors during the post-bolus refresh cannot be reported as a bolus failure (see diff:5f4173f51dcd; commit:e51fc67ee0455aa6bb5120e96e053fb53bcb92c7; pr:gordolio/Trio#1151).
summary.userFacingImpact: Should prevent spurious 'Bolus failed' notifications after a manual bolus when the pump has actually delivered the bolus but a subsequent algorithm refresh fails (the PR and commit cite examples such as 'Not enough glucose data' during CGM warm-up) (pr:nightscout/Trio#1151; commit:e51fc67ee0455aa6bb5120e96e053fb53bcb92c7). The change is limited to error handling around determineBasalSync(); runtime verification/testing is recommended to confirm behavior in all environments (diff:5f4173f51dcd).
